subject: [PATCH v2 14/21] fuse: add passthrough support for entry creation

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support for passthrough operations in the FUSE file system, specifically for entry creation operations such as mknod, mkdir, symlink, and link. When FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO is enabled, it uses the new extended fuse_entry2_out reply to associate a newly created inode with a backing file for passthrough operations. If no backing id is returned, statx attributes are cached instead.
